# Raw Transcript Cache

This directory is for raw caption text captured from Predictive History YouTube videos.

Raw caption files are ignored by git by default. They are useful for audit and sync work, but they are not quote-grade unless the relevant passage has been checked against video/audio or a reliable timestamp segment.

Do not edit raw cache files to make them read better. Put curated repairs in the curated lecture layer and record recurring ASR issues in `ASR-AUDIT-LOG.md`.
